---
title: "."
---

This is a Quarto website.

To learn more about Quarto websites visit <https://quarto.org/docs/websites>.

---
title: "Saori Kikuchi Portfolio"
---

# Welcome

Hello! My name is Saori Kikuchi.

I am currently studying data analytics and have a background in accounting. I am interested in business analytics and AI.

## About Me

I am learning Python, data analysis, and cloud computing using AWS EC2. This website is created using Quarto and GitHub Pages.
